name: eBird
tagline: Find recent bird observations by region
description: Retrieve recent eBird observations for a country, subnational region, or supported location code with time-window and result controls.

auth.hint: Request a personal eBird API key and send it in the X-eBirdApiToken header.

tools.name: list_recent_observations
tools.description: Return recent bird observations within an eBird region.

params.name: region_code
params.description: eBird country, subnational, or location region code.

params.name: back
params.description: Number of days back to search.

params.name: detail
params.description: Observation detail level, such as simple or full.

params.name: hotspot
params.description: Restrict results to hotspot locations when true.
